prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约21710→25742→37931→30768→33985，整体呈波动后移趋势；2023年因选科要求调整（全部改为物化必选）位次大幅后移至37931，2024年回弹至30768，2025年再度后移至33985，近两年累计后移约3217名；2025年基准约33985名；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划2021年258人、2022年271人、2023年241人、2024年239人、2025年256人；2026年计划299人，较2025年扩招43人（+16.8%），扩招幅度显著，理论上可缓解部分竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第49名，较2025年第52名上升3位，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力持续增强；近年声誉评价中性/混合，2023年曾出现投档线异常相关讨论但影响有限；抖音综合热度排名第94位（一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显负面舆情或报考热度异常信号；交通运输工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A，在轨道交通、土木工程领域具有突出学科优势；机械、电气、计算机等相关工科专业实力强劲，对理科考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，社会报考热度高；江苏省物理类考生数从2021年16.6万持续增长至2025年26.1万，2026年估算约37.9万（按总考生521000及历史比例），考生规模大幅增加约45%，竞争显著加剧；省控线（本科批）从2021年417分逐年升至2025年463分，整体录取门槛提高；西南交通大学位于四川成都，非本省高校；江苏省考生对省外优质211高校报考意愿较强，该校在江苏招生占比约3–4%，属中等偏下水平，跨省报考存在一定地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次33985名、2026年大幅扩招16.8%（理论上推位次后移约3425名）、江苏省物理类考生数大幅增长约45%（加剧竞争）、软科排名上升3位（增强吸引力）等多重因素；考虑考生规模激增对竞争的加剧作用超过扩招的缓解效应，以及学校排名上升带来的吸引力增强，预测2026年物理类最低位次约37210名，区间36710–37710名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 21710 → 25742 → 37931 → 30768 → 33985, showing a fluctuating and declining trend. In 2023, due to adjustments in subject requirements (all changed to mandatory Physics and Chemistry), the ranking significantly dropped to 37931, rebounded to 30768 in 2024, and further declined to 33985 in 2025, with a cumulative decline of about 3217 positions over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 33985. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Province for Physics Category was 258 in 2021, 271 in 2022, 241 in 2023, 239 in 2024, and 256 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 299, an increase of 43 students (+16.8%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically could alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science University Ranking, it ranked 49th, up 3 places from 52nd in 2025, indicating a steady improvement in overall strength. Recent reputation evaluations are neutral/mixed; in 2023, there were discussions related to abnormal admission cutoffs but with limited impact. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (average), with exposure on short video platforms at a moderately low level, showing no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal application heat signals. Transportation Engineering is A+ (top nationally), and Civil Engineering is A, with outstanding disciplinary advantages in rail transit and civil engineering. Majors such as Mechanical, Electrical, and Computer Engineering are strong, attracting science-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended with high social application heat. The number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province has grown from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, with an estimated 379,000 in 2026 (based on total candidates of 521,000 and historical proportions), a significant increase of about 45%, intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has risen from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, raising the overall admission threshold. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university. Jiangsu candidates have a strong willingness to apply to high-quality 211 universities outside the province, with this university's enrollment share in Jiangsu about 3–4%, at a moderately low level, with some regional preference influence for cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 33985, a significant 16.8% enrollment expansion in 2026 (theoretically pushing the ranking back by about 3425 positions), a substantial 45% increase in the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province (intensifying competition), and a 3-place rise in the Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and taking into account that the intensification of competition due to the surge in candidate numbers outweighs the alleviating effect of enrollment expansion, as well as the increased attractiveness from the university's ranking rise, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 37210, with a range of 36710–37710.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 37210, with a range of 36710–37710. Candidates within this ranking range are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, etc.) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Materials Science, etc.) as safety choices. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<36710) can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors; those near the lower limit (>37710) should prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as supplements. The university's Transportation Engineering is an A+ discipline, and related majors offer high value, deserving special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 5234 → 6073 → 7093 → 7575 → 7818, continuously shifting backward for five consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 2584 places; the 2025 baseline is about 7818, with an average annual shift of about 240 places over the past three years, showing a stable backward trend; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu Province was 22 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 25 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24, a reduction of 1 (-4%) compared to 2025, with a small but clear reduction direction, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 49th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 3 places from 2025, with continuously improving comprehensive strength and brand influence, positively affecting liberal arts candidates' willingness to apply; recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 94th (average), with medium to low exposure on short video platforms, showing no abnormal application heat signal; the university is strong in engineering, with liberal arts majors (Law, Journalism and Communication, Foreign Languages and Literature, etc.) having no A-level discipline evaluations, overall liberal arts strength is relatively weak compared to engineering, but the 211 platform still has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity (recommended), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu Province increased from 95,000 in 2021 to 97,000 in 2025, with an estimated 142,000 in 2026 (based on total candidates of 521,000 and history proportion), a significant increase of about 46%, sharply intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 476 in 2021 to 482 in 2025, overall stable with a slight increase; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university; Jiangsu History Category candidates have average willingness to apply to out-of-province 211 universities, and the university has a small enrollment plan for liberal arts in Jiangsu (24-30 people), with cross-province applications subject to certain regional preference effects.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 7818, a small 4% enrollment reduction in 2026 (pushing ranking backward by about 188 places), a significant 46% increase in Jiangsu History Category candidates (sharply intensifying competition), and a 3-place rise in university ranking (enhancing appeal); given that the surge in candidate numbers intensifies competition far more than the enrollment reduction, and the rise in university ranking increases appeal, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 7730, with a range of 7230-8230.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 7730, with a range of 7230-8230. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Journalism and Communication, Political Science and Public Administration, Public Administration) as main choices, Tier 1 majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, Chinese Language and Literature) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Foreign Languages and Literature, Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages) as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly above the upper limit (<7230) can focus on popular majors like Law; those near the lower limit (>8230) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors. The university's liberal arts majors are overall weaker than engineering, but the 211 platform still offers high cost-effectiveness for liberal arts candidates.
